CustomField.description: Free-text capture of why the Case was assigned to its current queue owner. Stamped by CaseTriggerHandler from Case_Routing_Reason__mdt after the Case AssignmentRule fires (the rule has no native arbitrary-field update). Mirrors Lead.Routing_Reason__c. Built in — the Case half, which deferred.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Last routing decision explanation. Overwritten on every re-route — do not rely on manual edits.
CustomField.label: Routing Reason
